content.question: Whether teacher supply and instructional-resource capacity in Hungary would permit full-scale implementation of delayed tracking without reducing quality for higher-achieving or vocational-track students.
content.reduction_path: Current teacher-shortage forecasts for Hungary (age-cohort, attrition, supply from initial teacher education, cross-border migration); cost estimates for expanding comprehensive-school capacity and teacher development programmes; simulations of class composition and teacher allocation under delayed tracking.
